tabs.model.label: Model
settings.advisor.enabled.label: Enable Advisor
settings.advisor.enabled.description: Pair a second model (assigned to the 'advisor' role) that passively reviews each turn and injects notes.
settings.advisor.subagents.label: Advisor for Subagents
settings.advisor.subagents.description: Also enable the advisor on spawned task/eval subagents.
settings.advisor.syncBacklog.label: Advisor Sync Backlog
settings.advisor.syncBacklog.description: Pause the main agent for up to 30 seconds if the advisor falls behind by this many turns. Off disables catch-up delays.
settings.advisor.immuneTurns.label: Advisor Immune Turns
settings.advisor.immuneTurns.description: After an advisor concern or blocker interrupts, route further concerns/blockers non-interruptingly for this many primary turns.
settings.images.describeForTextModels.de: When an image is attached to a model without vision support, save it under local:// and inject a description from a vision-capable model instead of dropping it
settings.defaultThinkingLevel.label: Thinking Level
settings.hideThinkingBlock.label: Hide Thinking Blocks
settings.hideThinkingBlock.description: Hide thinking blocks in assistant responses
settings.proseOnlyThinking.label: Prose Only Thinking
settings.proseOnlyThinking.description: Omit code blocks from thinking summaries and replace them with an ellipsis
settings.omitThinking.label: Omit Thinking summaries
settings.omitThinking.description: Instruct upstream providers to completely omit thinking summaries from responses (where supported)
settings.model.loopGuard.enabled.label: Loop Guard
settings.model.loopGuard.enabled.descrip: Enable automatic stream loop detection for Gemini and DeepSeek models
settings.model.loopGuard.checkAssistantC: Apply loop guard to assistant prose messages in addition to thinking logs
settings.model.loopGuard.toolCallReminde: When a Gemini reasoning stream emits many consecutive planning headers without calling a tool, interrupt it and inject a reminder to issue a tool call (requires Loop Guard)
settings.inlineToolDescriptors.label: Inline Tool Descriptors
settings.inlineToolDescriptors.descripti: Render full tool descriptors in the system prompt and strip top-level/nested descriptions from provider tool schemas so descriptor text is sent once. Auto enables this for Gemini models and disables it otherwise
settings.inlineToolDescriptors.options.a: Inline descriptors for Gemini models; keep them in tool schemas otherwise
settings.inlineToolDescriptors.options.o: Always inline descriptors in the system prompt
Keep descriptors in provider tool schemas only
settings.includeModelInPrompt.label: Include Model in Prompt
settings.includeModelInPrompt.descriptio: Surface the active model identifier in the system prompt so the agent knows which model it is
settings.includeWorkspaceTree.label: Include Workspace Tree
settings.includeWorkspaceTree.descriptio: Render the workspace directory tree in the system prompt. WARNING: This can bust prompt caching across sessions when files are modified.
settings.personality.label: Personality
settings.personality.description: Communication style rendered into the system prompt's personality block
settings.personality.options.default.des: Terse, evidence-first engineer; dense, action-oriented replies
settings.personality.options.friendly.de: Warm, encouraging collaborator focused on momentum and morale
settings.personality.options.pragmatic.d: Direct, efficient engineer focused on clarity and rigor
settings.personality.options.none.label: None
settings.temperature.label: Temperature
settings.temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0 = deterministic, 1 = creative, -1 = provider default)
settings.temperature.options.-1.label: Default
settings.topP.label: Top P
settings.topP.options.-1.label: Default
settings.topK.label: Top K
settings.topK.description: Sample from top-K tokens (-1 = provider default)
settings.topK.options.-1.label: Default
settings.minP.label: Min P
settings.minP.options.-1.label: Default
settings.presencePenalty.label: Presence Penalty
settings.presencePenalty.description: Penalty for introducing already-present tokens (-1 = provider default)
settings.repetitionPenalty.label: Repetition Penalty
settings.repetitionPenalty.description: Penalty for repeated tokens (-1 = provider default)
settings.textVerbosity.label: Text Verbosity
settings.textVerbosity.description: OpenAI Responses and Codex response verbosity (low, medium, or high)
settings.textVerbosity.options.low.label: Low
settings.serviceTier.label: Service Tier
settings.serviceTierSubagent.label: Service Tier - Subagent
settings.serviceTierSubagent.description: Service Tier for spawned task/eval subagents. Inherit = match the main agent's live tier (tracks /fast); pick a value to scope subagents independently.
settings.serviceTierAdvisor.label: Service Tier - Advisor
settings.serviceTierAdvisor.description: Service Tier for the advisor model. None = standard processing; Inherit = match the main agent's live tier; pick a value (e.g. Priority) to run the advisor on a faster serving path.
settings.fastModeScope.label: Fast Mode Scope
settings.fastModeScope.options.openai.de: Priority on OpenAI/OpenAI-Codex requests; ignored elsewhere
settings.fastModeScope.options.claude.de: Anthropic fast mode on direct Claude requests; ignored elsewhere
settings.retry.maxRetries.label: Retry Attempts
settings.retry.maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts on API errors
settings.retry.maxDelayMs.label: Max Retry Delay
settings.retry.maxDelayMs.description: Maximum wait between retries, in ms. When the provider asks us to wait longer than this and no credential or model fallback succeeds, the request fails fast instead of sleeping (e.g. 3-hour Anthropic rate-limit windows).
settings.retry.modelFallback.label: Retry Model Fallback
settings.retry.modelFallback.description: Allow retry recovery to switch to configured fallback models
settings.retry.fallbackRevertPolicy.desc: When to return to the primary model after a fallback
settings.retry.fallbackRevertPolicy.opti: Return to the primary model after its suppression window ends
Stay on the fallback model until manually changed
settings.providers.autoThinkingModel.des: Difficulty classifier for the `auto` thinking level: online (the TINY role from /models, else smol) by default, or a local on-device model
